message:
fix(c_interop): Update ArrayList API for Zig 0.15

Migrate ArrayList usage from .init(allocator) to struct literal .{}
and pass allocator to each method call per Zig 0.15 API changes:

- _interpreters.zig: list_all function
- _xxinterpchannels.zig: Channel.queue field and list_all function
- _io/fileio.zig: fileio_readall result buffer
- xxsubtype.zig: SpamList.items field (store allocator in struct)
- bytearrayobject.zig: iterator byte buffer
- ceval.zig: thread_state_pool
- objimpl.zig: to_remove in PyGC_Collect
- mapper.zig: getRequiredLibraries
- registry.zig: getSupportedPackages
